params.name: The Age of Bronze
params.description:
On Sept 1, 1876 AD, Rodin completed The Age of Bronze.
Inspired by Michelangelo's sculptures, Rodin created this masterpiece, using a young soldier as his model. However, when critics doubted its authenticity, Rodin amazed them by presenting a nude male sculpture on the spot. This bold move solidified his reputation as a revered master sculptor.
